title: Old Loves and New
actors: Lewis Stone, Barbara Bedford, Walter Pidgeon
plot: Gervas Carew's wife, Elinor, has deserted him while he was fighting for France, for Lord Clyde Geraldine, a cad of the first order, but Elinor, in turn is cast off when Lord Geraldine turns his attention to an Irish lass, Marny. M...
